creator: joseph.scott@owp.csus.edu
text:
Add WWW to description of devel/p5-Date-Manip

diff -urN devel/p5-Date-Manip/pkg/DESCR.orig devel/p5-Date-Manip/pkg/DESCR
--- devel/p5-Date-Manip/pkg/DESCR.orig  Fri Jan 21 10:28:06 2000
+++ devel/p5-Date-Manip/pkg/DESCR       Fri Jan 21 10:28:19 2000
@@ -53,3 +53,5 @@
        actually somewhat misleading.  Date::Manip works with the
        full date AND time (year, month, day, hour, minute,
        second).
+
+WWW: http://www.cise.ufl.edu/~sbeck/
